label: FAIL
rationale: ProgrammaticResetEnable preconfiguration is FALSE, and the packet shows no successful enable before TPerReset; when disabled, TPER_RESET SHALL be aborted at the interface level, so SUCCESS is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: The trajectory successfully sets TPerInfo column 8, ProgrammaticResetEnable, to true before the target; when enabled, TPER_RESET SHALL be accepted and acknowledged at the interface level, matching SUCCESS.

label: FAIL
rationale: After ProgrammaticResetEnable is set true, TPerReset SUCCESS is acceptable, but the reset SHALL abort all open sessions before the next command. The following Get is issued without a new StartSession and succeeds, so the target response is not compliant with the required session abort effect.
